name: Zendesk

composio_registry_match.name: Zendesk
composio_registry_match.description: Zendesk provides customer support software with ticketing, live chat, and knowledge base features, enabling efficient helpdesk operations and customer engagement

description: A comprehensive customer service and helpdesk platform featuring AI-powered autonomous agents, ticketing, and omnichannel communication management.
notes: Zendesk has an extensive, well-documented REST API and official MCP server implementations exist in the community.
